title: quiina brevensis
intro: Quiina brevensis is a species of plant in the family Quiinaceae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Quiina brevensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Quiina brevensis can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
